home.title: Sanatan Shiv Shakti — Spiritual & Charitable Organization, Howrah
home.description: Non-political, youth-led spiritual and charitable organization in Howrah, West Bengal. Bhajan Kirtan, Sundar Kand, Gau Seva, food distribution & youth development. Join our weekly Tuesday satsang.

about.title: About Us — Sanatan Shiv Shakti
about.description: Learn about Sanatan Shiv Shakti, a youth-led spiritual and charitable organization from Ward 35, Howrah — our story, vision, mission and values.
